name: PR-1066 Visibility Code Review Response
description: Review code review comments on Bitbucket PR 1066 (mercury-services / visibility) and draft responses in visibility/docs/2026-06-29-code-review-comments.md

entries.summary: Connected to Bitbucket PR 1066 and fetched 7 unresolved code review comments
entries.detail:
PR 1066 = ION-12316 Visibility AWS SDK 2.x cloud-sdk upgrade. Source: feature/ION-12316-visibiilty-aws-upgrade-copilot -> develop. All 7 comments by Sumesh Jacob, all OPEN:
1) 171895 wm-inbound-processor/pom.xml:20 - cloud-sdk deps transitive via visibility-inbound? avoid explicit?
2) 171893 itv-gps-processor/pom.xml:18 - same
3) 171891 inbound/pom.xml:39 - move version to maven property
4) 171890 inbound/conf/prod/config.yaml:82 (REMOVED) - where do apps load config now?
5) 171888 commons/pom.xml:160 - parameterize dependency versions
6) 171866 Condition.java:36 - why explicit getter when lombok present
7) 171863 ContainerEventPending.java:37 - impact of type change to existing records

entries.summary: Drafted responses to all 7 PR-1066 comments and wrote review-response doc
entries.detail:
Analyzed diffs vs merge-base f992aaa. Findings per comment:
1/2) cloud-sdk-api/aws ARE transitive via visibility-inbound (compile scope, no version override) -> optionally removable.
3/5) Hard-coded versions log4j 2.23.1, aws-java-sdk v1 1.12.721, maven-dependency-plugin 3.6.1 -> agree to parameterize in parent visibility/pom.xml.
4) Removed dynamoDbTableCreationCommandConfig was legacy dynamo-client table provisioning; runtime config retained as dynamoDbConfig->BaseDynamoDbConfig (cloud-sdk). Table admin now via cloud-sdk table-admin tooling. No runtime config lost.
6) Condition.getValues() explicit getter is redundant (attr name 'values' already derived) -> agree remove.
7) ContainerEventPending createDate LocalDate->String: byte-identical ISO-8601 String (type S), no impact on existing records.
Doc written: visibility/docs/2026-06-29-code-review-comments.md. No code changes applied; awaiting user confirmation.

entries.summary: Deferred code changes to 2026-06-30 after rebase due to develop merge conflict; doc + session updated
entries.detail: PR branch feature/ION-12316-visibiilty-aws-upgrade-copilot has a merge conflict with latest develop. Decision: defer all review-comment code changes to 2026-06-30. Plan: (1) rebase branch onto develop and resolve conflicts FIRST, (2) re-verify diff line numbers for the 7 comments may shift, (3) apply agreed changes A-F (parameterize versions; remove redundant Condition.getValues()), pending confirmation on whether to drop transitive cloud-sdk deps in the two processor POMs (Comments 1/2), (4) run mvn -pl visibility/visibility-commons,visibility/visibility-inbound,visibility/visibility-wm-inbound-processor,visibility/visibility-itv-gps-processor -am verify, (5) post draft responses and push. Doc updated with deferral note + resume plan: visibility/docs/2026-06-29-code-review-comments.md. Session left ACTIVE.
Agent model for this session: Claude Opus 4.8 (model id claude-opus-4-8), GitHub Copilot CLI.

usage.note: Approximate cumulative usage for PR-1066 review session (connect to PR, fetch 7 comments, analyze diffs, draft responses doc, defer for rebase). Estimated from turn activity; exact provider usage block not surfaced to agent.
